entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor L. Moench, the crop plant studied for biochemical changes upon virus infection

entities.name: MAIZE MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that infects sorghum plants and causes biochemical changes

entities.name: PLANT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the sorghum plant, which decreases upon infection

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of chlorophyll in the leaves of the plant

entities.name: NITRATE REDUCTASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The activity of the nitrate reductase enzyme in leaves and stems

entities.name: NITROGEN CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of nitrogen in the leaves and stems of the plant

entities.name: SOLUBLE SUGARS
entities.description: The concentration of soluble sugars in the leaves and stems

entities.name: ELECTROPHORETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: A technique used to analyze soluble leaf proteins

entities.name: SOLUBLE LEAF PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins found in the leaves of the plant

entities.name: POLYPEPTIDES
entities.description: Specific proteins of 21 and 22 kD found in infected leaves

entities.name: ELECTRO-BLOT IMMUNOASSAY
entities.description: A technique used to determine if polypeptides are of viral origin
